title: Level Metalanguage (Joke)
wikitext: {{Joke}} {{Class Undetermined|safety=Unsafe|security=Unsecure|entity=[ridiculously_high_number] of [random_entity]}}'''Level Big Number''' is the '''[enormous_ordinal_number_+_1]''' level of the Backrooms. It's generally inhabited by the adventurers that get trapped there and by the '''[weird_game_reference]'''. ==Description== '''Level Big Number''' is an unconfirmed level with no real information. '''Level Big Number''' is estimated to be several square kilometres long. It's very long. It is possible that is not a small hallway. This level has grass field. [[File:Level Metalanguage View.png|thumb|Allegedly, this is the appearance of Level Big Number, photographer immediately died after taking the photo.]] Upon entering the level, you will be received by a lot of [[Partygoers]] that will try to devour you. This is to keep the level safe and protected from unwanted explorers, and was implemented by '''[random_undetailed_group]'''. They also control the level in general, keeping it safe from [[The Howler|Howlers]] and [[Entity 3|Smilers]]. It was discovered by '''[inactive_fandom_user]''' and by '''[inactive_fandom_user's_friend]'''. It also '''[brief_reference_of_unfunny_and_overused_meme]''' . Did I say that the level has '''[very_dangerous_characteristic]''' that will kill you '''[microscopic_decimal_number]''' milliseconds after entering the level? In '''Level Metalanguage''' (new name!), you can also find '''[undetailed_forgotten_lore]''' wandering around the vents of the level. nEvEr LiCk ThE dUsT! Seriously. Why would you lick the dust of the ventilation system? This level also has a room (sublevel) system, that you can find after you walk '''[unnecessary_long_number]''' kilometers away from the place that you entered. Is that sublevel room system actually necessary? No, this is just a filler for my page to have the “minimum” quantity of bytes. Also, why not? '''The only thing that matters is to enter the longest pages ranking…''' ===Sub-Level 1=== Sub-Level 1 is the first of the four sublevels present. There, you can find everything trashy and below that happens in the Backrooms Fandom wiki. ''Do you want people breaking Rule 4 constantly?'' '''We have it.''' ''Edit-crammers that don't really care about the quality of pages?'' '''We also have it.''' ''Users copying Wikidot every time? Milestone pages still being created? Zalgo spammers? Multiple Partygoer clones?'' '''It's all yours.''' ===Sub-Level 2=== Sub-Level 2 is basically the same place as the previous sublevel, but with even more toxicity (if it's even possible). People that did more harm than good to the Backrooms wiki wanting to be sysops, vandalizing other wikis for what they received backlash here (below the minimum fandom age, specifically), and everything you think would fit in [https://backrooms.fandom.com/f Drama Land™]. ===Sub-Level 3=== Surprisingly, Sub-Level 3, defying all laws of common sense, gravity, space-time and whatever theory that you believe in, is even worse than the previous sublevel. There, people generally create pages used solely to spam a single character to gain their precious bytes, to see how many people can edit a page, and mistake the purpose of community and pages! Very cool! ===Sub-Level 4=== Like sublevel 3, but childish arguments break out every second. People are creating pages that are straight out +18 content, calling moderators serious slurs, creating drama about the Wikidot and the fandom and other worse things. Everything is on fire, and no one seems to help. === Sub-Level 5 === Sub-Level 5 does not exist... ===Sub-Level 6=== This one is surprisingly calm, as it has no permanent inhabitants. The level consists of a dead fandom, full of spam. The last message on the forums reads “deez nuts”, with no other context. There were reports of inhabitants in this level, that were calm and collective, but few and far between and never staying for very long, so it is speculated that this level takes place at the very end of the wiki. Oh, you wonder what happened to Sub-Level 5? We don't talk about what happened to it here… Occasional episodes of users trying to revive the wiki can be found. At the center of this sub-level is what appears to be an obelisk of sort, with various shitposts carved onto it like some sort of bizarre gravestone or memorial. Its purpose is unknown. ==Colonies and Outposts== '''Level [astronomical_number]''' has colonies and outposts. Here are some of them: ==='''[unfunny_reference_to_ Among_Us]'''=== * This colony has '''["funny"_number]''' members (estimated); *The founder and leader of the colony is '''[arbitrary_self_insertion]'''; *'''["SCARY"_ALL_CAPS_MESSAGE]'''; *'''[[[User:SetaCraft]]]'''. ==='''[unfunny_reference_to_Spongebob]'''=== * This outpost has around '''[another_funny_number]''' members; *'''[unexpected_long_zalgo_sentence]'''; *The voices. Oh my god, the voices. I can't stand the voices! ==Entities== ==='''[insert_fandom_inside_joke]'''=== This entity was discovered in '''Level [are_you_still_reading_number]''' by '''[fandom_user_that_only_makes_jokes]'''. It is extremely dangerous! Don't stay next to it, or you will have your organs ripped out of your body at Mach '''[unneccesarily_enormous_numeral]'''. Also, any entity that you want can be found in this level. Why not? Just use your imagination, man. None of this even is real, it's just a bunch of bytes trying to connect with each other. === [[Moderators|The Mods]] === Highly dangerous beings that are extremely narcissist, and think that their pages are better than any others. Would delete 90% of the pages in Fandom if they could. Their properties are highly variable, with some individuals being highly aggressive, while others hibernate for most of their life. Never say that they are wrong; you might be blocked by [[User:Egglord1|their "king"]]. ===The Langalangs=== The Langalangs are people who speak langa, a highly advanced language that the only sound made is Langalang. The Langalangs are friendly and wear plastic shirts everywhere they go. They walk around aimlessly and be stupid. We asked a Langalang if he could explain what life was like in a daily basis, they responded with “Langalang” Which roughly translates to “Get the hell out of my face!”. Studies are still being made. === Wayback-Lurkers === Wayback-Lurkers are an elusive entity exclusively found within the sixth sublevel. Theorized to be a specific breed of former inhabitants from the first four sublevels, they've gained this name by using the Wayback Machine to access ancient relics from earlier sublevels. What drives them to do this is unknown, and it is theorized they may have something to do with the obelisk at the center of sublevel 6. They manifest as quickly as they leave, and only one has been photographed. == The One Millionth Fun War== The One Millionth (1,000,000th) Fun War in '''Level Metalanguage''' turned out to be the first, not the one millionth. People wanted to document it as a big number, and the name stuck with the wanderers. It all started when the '''“Pope Enemies and Allies”''' (P.E.A) formally declared war against the '''“The Obama Sevens”''' (O7). It originated from disputed claims to the Pope between the Original Obama and one of the Pope's bishops. Over time, the war grew into absolute chaos between the two organization, the "'''Magic" Earvin Johnson Group''' (written as [[M.E.G.]] for grammatical purposes) and the Partygoer Fandom. It was one of the most notable conflicts between the [[Joke Levels]]. For 97 [[The Frontrooms|Frontroom]] years, interrupted by some documented and undocumented truces that lasted about 2 years, 3-4 generations of families, friends, and relatives fought to claim the Partygoer copyright terms (and its variations). The war had deep effects on the Backrooms exploration, as adventurers sought a way to explore what was happening around that area. All sides invested in advanced equipment and military technology which permanently changed the Backrooms dimension as a whole. ===Origins=== The root of the conflict can be traced to the mass cleaning of the wiki between July and October. The outbreak of the war was motivated by a gradual rise in deletion by the moderators and administrators, more specifically [[User:Egglord1|Egglord1]], [[User:PuppyBorkbutaccountgotwiped|PuppyBorkbutaccountgotwiped]] and [[User:OGominho|OGominho]]; the official pretext was the question that arose because of the speculations that the page and all related lore would be also be deleted. ===Start of War=== Around 184 Frontroom years ago, the actual Pope was invited to meet with Obama Second in his palace, located in [[Level 11]] but refused. Then, 3 months after, Pope met with his allies and affirmed that the Partynoers section should be claimed again in P.E.A's domain instead of O7's one. Original Obama accepted the unofficial declaration of war, and shifted his users to the subheader. Three Frontroom years after, ⁣Pope shifted his other users to the top left section of the Lardyloers section, in an offensive formation. For their luck, dead pixels obliged the Obama's troops to relocate to another position, that allowed Pope and his bishops to easily conquer the Partynoers section. However, the O7 did conquer the Lardyloer description, that was already heavily destroyed by previous transformations. ===Truces=== Between small conquers and defeats of both organizations, eventually they declared truces between the war, as it was mentally and physically exhausting for the Fandom users to be aware of their surroundings all the time. Surprisingly, both the P.E.A and the O7 respected the truces and their durations. ===End of War=== One of the main factors for the P.E.A victory on the One Millionth Fun War was the return of old users to the Fandom community, that helped them to dominate over the Obama Sevens. After the Pope's cardinals easily conquered the Partyhumans and Partyfakers documentation, Obama Fourth saw himself in the obligation to end the war completely and give the entire Partygoer page to the other organization, while also being responsible for the payment of the damage caused to his enemy during the battle. His Holiness’s victory meant the end of an instability that had been seeded since the start of the Backrooms Wiki cleanup, while M.E.G could settle themselves as a giant organization around the most known levels of the dimension. The Obama Sevens were heavily affected by the costs of the battle, while the Partygoers Fandom had to accept the fate of their support. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entering '''Level Metalanguage'''=== * You have a 0.'''[103_zeros]'''69% chance to enter this level by doing a backflip and listening to '''Donda Chant''' 3 times while in [[Level 0]]. *By spitting on a Partygoer’s face and telling him ''“ratio + yb better”'' on Level Fun, you may get here. * You could get here by spamming 1,800,000 Negative Squared Latin Capital Letter B's on a Backrooms Fandom wiki page. *Entering a yellow portal in [[Level ¿¿¿]] may lead to this level. *If you go to https://galaxy.click/ and scream at your device ['''1_with_googolplexplexplex_zeros]'''times then run 54 miles and 2 inches, then a portal will open up and send you to [[Level 4]]. Then you type on 10 computers YO_MAMA_SKIBIDI_TOILET2048-ROBLOX<3MINECRAFThElLo WAFFLE!!! excess screaming!!!!!!!! AAAAA! (sin(x)^2*cos(x)^2+44)*6 times, You go to [[The End]]. Put atleast 69 computers in a pile. Then you go back to Level 4. Each loop you will gain an [[Object 1|Almond Water]], but don't drink it. If you drink it, the ceiling will crush you. When you do 50 loops, you'll go to [[Level 0]] but the level starts to break and a 5x10 grid shows that's out of your almond water. The wallpaper falls, the walls and ceiling start to break, etc. The grid starts to brighten more, and eventually it will lead to this level. ===Exiting Level Metalanguage=== *If you reach a computer with Wi-Fi and create a whole saga of levels talking about Gacha Fun and its derivations, you will go to the [https://backrooms.fandom.com/wiki/Special:Log/delete?offset=20210728132806&limit=1500&type=delete&user= Deletion Center]. *Spamming the wiki with undetailed levels above 10 digits and being sad when they get deleted will send you to my [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hiRacdl02w4 Hall of Shame]. *Interacting and communicating by creating a page rather than making a post or entering the discord in the Backrooms Wiki will send you to [[User:Coolcolapple|Coolcolapple]]'s bedroom. *Telling unfunny brainrot jokes will lead you to [[Level 666]] *Realizing that all these inside jokes are dead will send you to [[Level 0]]. *Saying "''Nine plus ten is Twenty-One!''" will send you to [[Nine Plus Ten Equals Twenty-One (Joke)]]. ==Extras== To make the level complete, don't forget to: *Sprinkle tons of categories that don't fit the content; * Add some ''''yo mama'''' jokes anywhere; *Of course; putting some fart and poop references, maybe recurring to '''Stinky Steve''' sometimes; *Powder these personalities: '''''Obama, Splatoon, Joe Biden, Roblox, Among Us, Stick Bug, Joe Mama, Rick Astley, Friday Night Funkin, SpongeBob, Partygoer, Brazil, Snipeegrounds, Doki Doki Literature Club, John Cena, Fortnite, and Garry's Mod;''''' *Don't forget to mince some exclamation marks with the number 1, a ton of emojis and caps lock.
